title: PSX-Place POPStarter release thread
notes: Official krHACKen release thread. Confirms POPStarter definition, legal boundary, attachment names, compatibility links, side projects, and regional documentation links. Retrieved 2026-06-21.

title: PSX-Place POPStarter page 4 - PATCH_9.BIN loader-disable post
notes: krHACKen tells Peppe90 to place attached PATCH_9.BIN in the POPS folder to disable the bugged ELF loader. Retrieved 2026-06-21.

title: PSX-Place POPStarter page 15 - IGR and BOOT.ELF discussion
notes: krHACKen recommends $IGR5 for OPL-like no-popup IGR and says black-screen exit can be avoided by disabling POPStarter's ELF loader or replacing/recompressing BOOT.ELF. Retrieved 2026-06-21.

title: Retro-Jogos POPStarter official guide mirror index
notes: Preserves the old wiki table of contents and says the documentation was originally by krHACKen and updated by ShaolinAssassin for Rev13 Beta 2019-06-05. Retrieved 2026-06-21.

title: Retro-Jogos POPStarter guide home
notes: Portuguese mirror of introduction/features/final-release notes. Mentions final 2019-06-05 beta and likely $IGR5 fix. Retrieved 2026-06-21.

title: ElOtroLado POPS emulator for PS2 thread
url: mention-only: ElOtroLado POPS emulator for PS2 thread
notes: El_Patas first post, edited many times through 2026-06-07, includes version list, HDD/USB/SMB setup, command behavior, SMB filenames, poweroff.irx, and warnings. Mentioned without an outbound public link per site policy. Retrieved 2026-06-21.

title: ShaolinAssassin POPStarter documentation wiki
notes: Original Bitbucket wiki is often unavailable. Use Archive.org and mirrors before treating claims as final.

title: Archive.org backup of ShaolinAssassin wiki
notes: Named in the seed as a required recovery source. Extraction/package inspection remains a follow-up.

title: POPSLoader by El_isra
notes: Resource page says POPSLoader is Lua/Enceladus based, supports USB/internal HDD in the initial release, keeps POPSLDR next to the ELF, includes PATCH_5.BIN IGR textures, and is officially abandoned by its author. Retrieved 2026-06-21.

title: Ripto/NathanNeurotic POPSLoader fork
notes: BETA-10 page documents mc0 requirement, BDMA rules, POPSTARTER.ELF paths, device layouts, art placement, HDD launch fix, and restored BOOT.ELF exit after real-hardware testing. Retrieved 2026-06-21.

title: BDM Assault GitHub repository
notes: README says BDM Assault brings exFAT USB support to old homebrew that can load external USB drivers. It documents exact POPStarter IRX rename paths. Retrieved 2026-06-21.

title: Hugopocked fixes for POPStarter
notes: Thread is for fix/patch discussion rather than general installation. It includes game-specific fix notes and SPU/GTE/GPU patch discussion. Retrieved 2026-06-21.

title: POPSLoader recovered POPStarter documentation site
url: mention-only: Nathanneurotic POPSLoader recovered documentation site
notes: Used as a cross-check for recovered ShaolinAssassin/Wayback wiki coverage, config-byte meanings, compatibility aliases, and archive inventory. Mentioned without an outbound public link because the goal here is to paraphrase facts and avoid mirroring binary-download links. Retrieved 2026-06-21.

title: User uploaded operational notes
notes: Local seed notes with confirmed modern USB/HDD/SMB/OPL/POPSLoader/wLE_kHn layouts. Preserve, but cross-check public-source-sensitive claims.

title: Discord POPStarter test screenshot
notes: Shows a user test where hdd0:/__common/POPS/POPSTARTER.ELF worked as POPStarter path and debug POPSTARTER behavior differed from classic/00 build.
